field.title: week_number
field.formula: DATEPART([date], "week")

field.title: week
field.guid_formula:
-- Выводим начало и конец недели
CONCAT(SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week")), "-", 3), '.', 
       SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week")), "-", 2), ' — ',
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 3), '.', -- Добавляем 6 дней
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 2), '.',
       RIGHT(SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date_6pqd], "week"), 6)), '-', 1), 2)
       )
field.formula:
-- Выводим начало и конец недели
CONCAT(SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date], "week")), "-", 3), '.', 
       SPLIT(STR(DATETRUNC([date], "week")), "-", 2), ' — ',
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 3), '.', -- Добавляем 6 дней
       SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 2), '.',
       RIGHT(SPLIT(STR(DATEADD(DATETRUNC([date], "week"), 6)), '-', 1), 2)
       )

field.title: cpf_uae
field.guid_formula:
IF SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae_mf43]) WITHIN [1a4559d0-8a0b-11ee-ba72-f57912038234]) > 0 THEN
    SUM(SUM([fact_ukhz]) WITHIN [1a4559d0-8a0b-11ee-ba72-f57912038234]) / SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae_mf43]) WITHIN [1a4559d0-8a0b-11ee-ba72-f57912038234])
END
field.formula:
IF SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae]) WITHIN [week_number]) > 0 THEN
    SUM(SUM([Факт расход]) WITHIN [week_number]) / SUM(SUM([total_followers_uae]) WITHIN [week_number])
END

field.title: % CPF
field.guid_formula:
IF AVG([dcd95570-8a0e-11ee-8bf1-83d8c0739f76]) > 0 THEN
    - ([dcd95570-8a0e-11ee-8bf1-83d8c0739f76] - AVG([cpf_9goh])) / AVG([cpf_9goh])
ELSE
    0
END
field.formula:
IF AVG([cpf_uae]) > 0 THEN
    - ([cpf_uae] - AVG([cpf_plan])) / AVG([cpf_plan])
ELSE
    0
END
